Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Microscopes can see video on a laserdisc 161 upvotes, 13 comments
  2. Artificial-life: A simple (300 lines of code) reproduction of Computational Life 47 upvotes, 4 comments
  3. FrameBook 338 upvotes, 62 comments
  4. Pushing and Pulling: Three reactivity algorithms 49 upvotes, 5 comments
  5. LibreOffice Writer now supports Markdown 261 upvotes, 48 comments
  6. Z80 Sans – a disassembler in a font (2024) 69 upvotes, 10 comments
  7. Agent Safehouse – macOS-native sandboxing for local agents 226 upvotes, 49 comments
  8. What if the Apple ][ had run on Field-Sequential? 74 upvotes, 16 comments
  9. Blacksky AppView 68 upvotes, 15 comments
  10. An Analysis of User-Space Idle State Instructions on x86 Processors 15 upvotes, 1 comments
  11. Every single board computer I tested in 2025 85 upvotes, 23 comments
  12. I made a programming language with M&Ms 35 upvotes, 8 comments
  13. Notes on writing Rust-based Wasm 194 upvotes, 84 comments
  14. Lil Finder Guy 53 upvotes, 18 comments
  15. PCB devboard the size of a USB-C plug 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  16. Show HN: I built a real-time OSINT dashboard pulling 15 live global feeds 145 upvotes, 70 comments
  17. Log messages are mostly for the people operating your software 99 upvotes, 49 comments
  18. We should revisit literate programming in the agent era 97 upvotes, 50 comments
  19. Linux Internals: How /proc/self/mem writes to unwritable memory (2021) 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  20. SQG (SQL to Code Generator) v0.10: Java Streams and List Type Support 12 upvotes, 3 comments
  21. Most of the US economy is in a recession 89 upvotes, 54 comments
  22. The changing goalposts of AGI and timelines 326 upvotes, 235 comments
  23. WSL Manager 61 upvotes, 35 comments
  24. Ask HN: Please restrict new accounts from posting 394 upvotes, 295 comments
  25. Why can't you tune your guitar? (2019) 163 upvotes, 120 comments
  26. Ask HN: How to be alone? 218 upvotes, 183 comments
  27. Living human brain cells play DOOM on a CL1 [video] 129 upvotes, 111 comments
  28. My Homelab Setup 113 upvotes, 103 comments
  29. My “grand vision” for Rust 100 upvotes, 95 comments
  30. Detection Is Not Protection: What WAF Detection Mode Does (and Doesn't) 9 upvotes, 4 comments

Last generated 8:00am, 9 March 2026. Source here.
